name: Home page shows club branding and register CTA
description: A visitor on the home page sees the dev club branding and can reach registration from the primary call to action.

planSteps.description: Verify the page shows the club name or dev/ยุคai branding and a visible primary action to register or sign up

name: User registers a new account and lands on dashboard
description: A new visitor completes registration with valid details and is signed in on the dashboard with their name shown.

planSteps.description: Open the registration page from the home page or navigation
Enter a unique full name, a unique email address, and a password with at least eight characters
Verify the user arrives on the authenticated dashboard and sees a welcome message containing the submitted full name

name: Registered user logs out and cannot access dashboard
description: After logout the session ends and the protected dashboard redirects to login.

planSteps.description: Register a new account with unique credentials and reach the dashboard
Sign out using the navigation logout control
Attempt to open the dashboard page directly
Verify the user is redirected to the login page and is not shown the protected dashboard content

name: Public members directory lists names without requiring login
description: The members page is reachable without authentication and shows member names in a list.

planSteps.description: Open the public members directory page without signing in
Verify the page shows a member list or empty-state message and does not require login to view member names

name: Login rejects invalid credentials with Thai error
description: Signing in with a wrong password shows a generic invalid-credentials message in Thai.

planSteps.description: Register a new account with unique credentials
Sign out after reaching the dashboard
Open the login page and submit the registered email with an incorrect password
Verify an error message indicates the email or password is incorrect and the user remains on the login page
